description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in Oracle Database server 8.1.7.4, 9.0.1.5, 9.0.1.5 FIPS, 9.2.0.7, 10.1.0.5, and 10.2.0.1 have unspecified impact and attack vectors, as identified by Oracle Vuln# (1) DB09 in the (a) Net Listener component; and (2) DB12 and (3) DB13 in the Network Communications (RPC) component.
